Banana Brad.description: anthropomorphic banana man, yellow smooth skin, muscular build, confident smirk, wearing gold chain and white vest, slicked-back green leaf hair, Pixar 3D style
Banana Brad.personality: Smooth-talking player, always flexing, thinks he's the main character

Strawberry Sindi.description: anthropomorphic strawberry woman, red glossy skin with tiny seed freckles, long green leaf hair flowing down, dramatic expression, gold hoop earrings, stylish crop top, Pixar 3D style
Strawberry Sindi.personality: Gorgeous drama queen from Durban, uses hayibo every 5 seconds

Apple Andile.description: anthropomorphic green apple man, bright green smooth skin, kind gentle eyes, neat short leaf hair, wearing casual button-up shirt, slightly shy posture, Pixar 3D style
Apple Andile.personality: The nice guy who always gets friend-zoned, loyal to a fault

Mango Mpho.description: anthropomorphic mango person, gradient orange-yellow skin, wild spiky leaf hair, mischievous grin, wearing bold streetwear and sunglasses, confident stance, Pixar 3D style
Mango Mpho.personality: The wildcard from Joburg, unpredictable, drops bombshells

Grape Gloria.description: anthropomorphic grape woman, deep purple skin, cluster of small grapes as hair bun, wise knowing expression, wearing elegant wrap dress and reading glasses, maternal figure, Pixar 3D style
Grape Gloria.personality: The wise aunty figure, gives unsolicited advice, secretly messy

Watermelon Wandi.description: anthropomorphic watermelon person, green striped exterior with hints of pink, tall imposing build, mysterious alluring expression, wearing trendy outfit, Pixar 3D style
Watermelon Wandi.personality: New arrival who causes chaos, everyone's attracted to them

Peach Palesa.description: anthropomorphic peach woman, soft fuzzy peach skin, rosy blush cheeks, sly calculating eyes, neat auburn leaf hair, wearing designer outfit, scheming posture, Pixar 3D style
Peach Palesa.personality: Sneaky strategist, plays both sides, master manipulator

Pineapple Pete.description: anthropomorphic pineapple man, golden-brown textured skin, tall spiky green crown hair, big goofy grin, round belly, wearing Hawaiian shirt, holding snack, Pixar 3D style
Pineapple Pete.personality: The comic relief, always eating, drops hilarious one-liners
